title: Convert All Code to Diagrams
shortDesc: Scans your entire document for Mermaid code blocks and renders them all as high-quality images in one click. No manual work.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert All Code to Diagrams
longDesc: Scans your entire Google Doc for Mermaid code blocks — both native Code Snippet elements and fenced ```mermaid blocks — and renders every one as a high-quality PNG image. You preview each diagram before choosing to Insert (after the code) or Replace (swap the code block).

title: Convert Selected Code to Diagram
shortDesc: Select a single code block or fenced Mermaid block and convert just that one. Useful when you want to render one diagram without scanning the whole document.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert Selected Code to Diagram
longDesc: Select a single code block or fenced Mermaid block and convert just that one. Useful when you want to render one diagram without scanning the whole document.

title: Insert Mermaid Diagram
shortDesc: Side-by-side editor with instant preview, syntax highlighting, and templates.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Insert Mermaid Diagram
longDesc: Opens a full-featured side-by-side editor with live preview. Write or paste Mermaid syntax on the left, see the rendered diagram update in real time on the right. Choose from built-in templates to jump-start any diagram type.

title: Edit Selected Mermaid Image
shortDesc: Click any diagram image and edit its source in place — no copy-paste needed.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Edit Selected Mermaid Image
longDesc: Click on any Mermaid diagram image that was inserted by this add-on, then run this command. The editor opens pre-loaded with the diagram's source code so you can tweak and re-render without starting over.

title: Fix Copied Markdown
shortDesc: Google Docs mangles Mermaid syntax when you copy from markdown. This tool repairs vertical tabs, stray backticks, and broken formatting so your diagrams render correctly. Learn more →
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Fix Copied Markdown
longDesc: The one feature you didn't know you needed — until Google Docs breaks your diagrams. Paste your corrupted code into the tool. It automatically: (1) Replaces all \v (vertical tab) characters with proper newlines, (2) Strips stray backtick fences that wrapped individual lines, (3) Removes invisible formatting artifacts, (4) Shows a side-by-side diff so you can see exactly what changed. Copy the fixed result and paste it back into your doc — it's now valid Mermaid syntax, ready to render.

title: Convert Image to Code
shortDesc: Extract the original Mermaid source from any diagram image inserted by this add-on.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert Selected Image to Code
menuAlt: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert All Images to Code
longDesc: Every diagram image inserted by this add-on embeds the original Mermaid source in its alt text. Use Convert Selected Image to Code on a single image, or Convert All Images to Code to extract source from every diagram in the document.

title: Templates & Gallery
shortDesc: Jump-start with flowcharts, sequences, ER diagrams, and 14 more types. Browse gallery →

title: Zero Data Collection
shortDesc: No analytics. No cookies. No telemetry. No servers. Your documents never leave your browser — rendering is 100% client-side via mermaid.js. The only external request is loading the mermaid.js library from jsDelivr.
